hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Get all three rows of aliens at the start using getStartingAliensInRow()

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Track your position so you can index into the alien rows to check for aliens

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: When you shoot an alien, mark it as false in the row array so you don't shoot it again

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Only shoot the lowest alien in a column — check rows from bottom to top

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You might find it easier to think about the fireworks last and just get the alien tracking and shooting sorted first

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Write a helper function to check if all aliens are dead across all rows
